auditFindings.issue: Direct use of jsonwebtoken instead of robust passport-jwt/OIDC strategy, leading to custom validation code that fallbacks to legacy mock-tokens.
auditFindings.remediation: Rewrite auth module to use NestJS OIDC/JWKS validation without falling back to mock or legacy tokens.

auditFindings.issue: Database module has synchronize: false which is correct, but relies on connection pooling settings without tight statement/lock timeouts.
auditFindings.remediation: Implement strict statement, lock, and idle-in-transaction timeouts in database configuration.
